base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve squeeze_long average PnL and net profit with minimal trade-count impact. Reject if larger targets increase exposure hours, reduce PnL/exposure, or cut fast winners; this is not expected to fix the -527 charm-pin MAE tail.
label: squeeze-upside-capture-check
rationale: Use batch_b_squeeze_long_take_profit as a contained, non-veto experiment. Broad 1DTE tightening, call-wall expansion, runtime exits, and charm-wall structure gates have hurt or gone flat. Squeeze_long is underexplored, profitable, and not tail-heavy, so a small TP expansion tests upside capture without over-filtering the leader.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Charm Pin Tail Box Precision Test
